{{CargoClone
|name=Great Lich
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=183
|gene1={race} HP +500
|gene2={race} FAME +50
|gene3=Each round, {race} HP +300
|gene4=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +6
|gene5=Zombie Minion Skin HP +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Water DMG +10
|gene7=Zombie Minion Skin HP +50%
|}}
